final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for LUMEA BEAUTY, a feminine Japanese skincare brand, designed as a clean bright airy UI layout with floral purple accents.

Style/medium: clean, bright, airy e-commerce UI mockup — functional asset, plain layout design with soft pink and white color palette, purple floral accent elements, soft diffused lighting throughout
Composition: full-width hero section layout; top navigation bar, three-column hero body (left copy column / center model / right product column), bottom benefit card row
Subject:
  Header — logo text "LUMEA BEAUTY" left-aligned; 5 navigation links: "特徴" "成分" "お客様の声" "使い方" "FAQ"; top-right CTA button "今すぐ試す" in soft pink
  Left column — large headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"; subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"; 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons: "敏感肌OK" "高保湿" "朝晩使える"; 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks: "美容成分をしっかり届ける" "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" "続けやすいシンプルケア"; 2 CTA buttons: primary "初回限定で試してみる >" and secondary "成分をチェック >"; trust badge strip "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Center column — young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum; model centered and well-lit against white background
  Right column — moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle and packaging box displayed; 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents: "満足度 96%" "美容成分 5種配合" "愛用者 12,000人突破"
  Bottom section — 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons: "うるおい" "透明感" "使いやすさ"
Scene/backdrop: white and soft pink background with scattered small purple flower illustrations as decorative accents
Lighting/mood: soft, even, diffused light — bright and airy, no harsh shadows, the gentle warmth of a skincare brand that promises clarity
Color palette: soft pink and white as primary palette, gold accents on stat cards, purple flower accents, pale pink CTA buttons
Materials/textures: smooth flat UI surfaces, white rounded rectangles with subtle drop shadows, pill-shaped badge components, clean sans-serif typography
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY" / "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ" / "今すぐ試す" / "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。" / "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。" / "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える" / "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア" / "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >" / "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし" / "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破" / "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: all Japanese text must be legible; three-column hero layout clearly separated; stat cards must visibly float with shadow; benefit cards aligned horizontally at bottom; navigation links evenly spaced in header
Avoid: dark backgrounds, cluttered layout, illegible small text, overly decorative artistic flourishes that obscure UI structure, generic stock-photo collage aesthetic

Style/medium: clean, bright, airy e-commerce UI mockup — functional asset, plain layout design with soft pink and white color palette, purple floral accent elements, soft diffused lighting throughout

  Center column — young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum; model centered and well-lit against white background
  Right column — moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle and packaging box displayed; 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents: "満足度 96%" "美容成分 5種配合" "愛用者 12,000人突破"

Color palette: soft pink and white as primary palette, gold accents on stat cards, purple flower accents, pale pink CTA buttons

Avoid: dark backgrounds, cluttered layout, illegible small text, overly decorative artistic flourishes that obscure UI structure, generic stock-photo collage aesthetic", "size": "1792x1008", "quality": "medium", "n": 1, "output_format": "png"}
